Security

Built for the people procurement audits.

We're a small team that takes security seriously. This page is the plain-language version; the technical posture lives in our DPA.

  • Encryption

    TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 at rest. Customer secrets (API keys, OAuth tokens) sealed in a per-org KMS envelope. Postgres TDE optional on Business+.

  • Data residency

    Pro and above pick their region at workspace creation: EU (Frankfurt) or US (Virginia). Enterprise can pin to a dedicated single-region Neo4j cluster.

  • Tenant isolation

    Postgres row-level security on every tenant-scoped table. Neo4j databases dedicated per Enterprise customer; logical isolation by org_id below that.

  • Compliance roadmap

    SOC 2 Type I within 12 months of GA. Type II within 24 months. ISO 27001 once we cross 25 paying workspaces. GDPR-aligned from day one (EU-incorporated, EU sub-processors).

  • Audit & logging

    Every privileged operation lands in the audit log. Customers on Business+ can export the audit log via API. Read replicas of the log retained for 13 months.

  • Disclosure

    We respond to security reports within one business day. Bounty program launches with the first paid pentest. Responsible disclosure: security@ontologia.com.

Sub-processors

Who we trust with your data.

We give 30 days' notice before adding or replacing a sub-processor. The full list lives at ontologia.com/legal/subprocessors.

Vendor Purpose Region
Neo4j Aura Graph database EU / US
Render Application hosting EU / US
Clerk Authentication US
Stripe Billing Global
Resend Transactional email EU
Cloudflare R2 Object storage Global
Sentry Error tracking US

Found something?

Email security@ontologia.com with your finding. PGP key fingerprint and bounty terms published when the bounty program goes live. We respond within one business day.

Need our DPA, SOC 2 letter, or pentest report?

Email hello@ontologia.com — we'll send what we have, and a roadmap for what we don't yet.

Request documents Read the SLA

The source of truth for your concepts. Design, version and ship the ontology your AI and data pipelines depend on.
